productDisplayName: Rockport Men Middle Field Brown Floater
description: Created with comfort in mind, these Middlefield Dark Brown sandals from rockport are a great addition to your wardrobe. Ruggedly crafted from heel to toe, this pair is both stylish and comfortable.  Pair these with casual wear for a cool look or with bermudas and tees when you go out exploring.Upper Leather upper for rugged feel and style Fabric lining for soft touch and protection from blisters Back strap to hold the foot firmly in place Midsole Well cushioned EVA midsole for long term durability, moulded comfort and protection against impact Moisture absorbent PU footbed for added dry comfort, breathability and shock absorption Outsole Durable rubber outsole to provide traction on various surfaces Flex grooves and traction rich rubber sole for anti-slip comfort shoe careUse a leather brush to dust off the dirtUse a branded leather shoe polish to maintain the shineDo not store shoes in direct sunlight
